<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Rfc4122; use Ramsey\Uuid\Nonstandard\UuidV6 as NonstandardUuidV6; /** * Reordered Gregorian time, or version 6, UUIDs include timestamp, clock sequence, and node values that are combined * into a 128-bit unsigned integer * * @link https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9562#section-5.6 RFC 9562, 5.6. UUID Version 6 * * @immutable */ final class UuidV6 extends NonstandardUuidV6 implements UuidInterface { }
